ArgumentListWrapping:FastingTypeDao.kt$FastingTypeDao$("SELECT * FROM ${FastingType.tableName} WHERE eating_hours = :eatingHours AND fasting_hours = :fastingHours ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1")

ArgumentListWrapping:Migrations.kt$Migrations.<no name provided>$("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${FastingType.tableName}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `fasting_hours` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `eating_hours` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)")

ArgumentListWrapping:Migrations.kt$Migrations.<no name provided>$("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `food_record` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `eat_time_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `carbohydrate` REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, `protein` REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, `fat` REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0)")
